package rulefixtures

import (
	"sort"
)

// scenario for sort_slice_vs_sort_sort: `sort.Sort(sort.StringSlice(s))` or custom `sort.Interface` implementations for basic types
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario640Positive(values []string) string {
	for range values {
		sort.Sort(sort.StringSlice(values))
	}
	if len(values) == 0 { return "" }
	return values[0]
}
